violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. - Employees not washing prior to gloving.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. - Condiments found uncovered.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Condiments not being help on ice. found at 80F
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Trailer leaking, needs repair
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - Items found in handwash station.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --- Need trap to cover ground. - Need more covering over ahead.
